image_label: test4 - Turkish villa 82 m2 (2+1) with canted SW bay, single-story plan

scale_origin.note: local origin = SW outer corner. x east, y north. Units cm -> m. Outer footprint ~8.85 (x) x 9.05 (y) m, NON-RECTANGULAR: SW corner is a canted 3-panel bay window (chamfered). Bottom-right is a covered Veranda inside the footprint.

strokes.note: outer perimeter (closed). The segment (1.65,0.00)->(0.00,1.50) is the canted SW bay face (approximated as one chamfer; actually a 3-panel bay: 59/170 + 105/170 + 59/170 windows S20-S22). North/east/south/west are the straight runs. Door openings on perimeter healed where present.
horizontal partition: upper rooms (bedrooms+banyo) / living (below). Healed door openings at x~=2.0 (bedroom1->living) and x~=6.3 (bedroom2->living). y=5.15 from left 515 band.
vertical partition: bedroom1 (Yatak 12.2, west) / Banyo. x=3.15 from top 315 band.
vertical partition: Banyo / bedroom2 (Yatak 13.8, east). x=3.15+1.91=5.06 from top 191 band. Healed door opening (banyo door) at y~=5.6.
vertical partition: living / Veranda (west edge of veranda). x=3.80 from bottom 380 band.
horizontal partition: Veranda (below) / living (above). y=1.78 from right 178 band. Carries 240/180 opening to veranda (S19).
bedroom1 north window 120/120 cm. z unknown. Parent S1 (north run).
bedroom1 west window 120/120 cm. z unknown. Parent S1 (west run).
bedroom2 north window 120/120 cm. z unknown. Parent S1 (north run).
bedroom2 east window 100/120 cm. z unknown. Parent S1 (east run).
banyo north small window 60/40 cm. z unknown. Parent S1 (north run).
living->veranda opening 240/180 cm. z unknown. Parent wall S6.
SW bay window panel 59/170 cm (lower-right angled face). z unknown. On chamfer of S1. LOW conf on angle.
SW bay window panel 105/170 cm (center angled face). z unknown. On chamfer of S1. LOW conf.
SW bay window panel 59/170 cm (upper-left angled face). z unknown. On chamfer of S1. LOW conf.

unknowns_noted: NON-RECTANGULAR: SW bay is the headline geometry feature. Traced as a single chamfer segment in the perimeter polyline; the true 3-panel bay (59/170 + 105/170 + 59/170) is approximated -> exact vertex positions of the bay are MEDIUM/LOW confidence
interior partition coords MEDIUM confidence from dim-chain bands
uncaptured_visual_elements: FURNITURE excluded: 2 beds + wardrobes; living sofas, armchairs, coffee table, dining table+chairs; kitchen counter; veranda lounge chairs + round table
SANITARY excluded: banyo sink, toilet, shower
EQUIPMENT excluded: stove, sink, fridge (kitchen along east wall of living)
FLOOR-FINISH excluded: beige floor fill; veranda checkerboard tile
HEALED DOORS (~3): bedroom1->living (S2 x~=2.0); bedroom2->living (S2 x~=6.3); banyo door (S4 y~=5.6)

BAY APPROXIMATION: the canted SW corner is genuinely a 3-panel bay window; phase1 represented it as one chamfer face in the perimeter + 3 window strokes (S20-S22). FLAG for phase2/skill: bay/oriel handling not yet in the schema vocabulary
WINDOWS S10-S22 captured at plan position; z absent
